name: prd-ux-audit
description: Bi-directional reconciliation of PRD requirements against UX Design System specifications. Detects conflicts, terminology drift, coverage gaps, and undocumented UX additions. Generates: (1) markdown reconciliation report, (2) interactive PRD↔UX matrix HTML with side-by-side comparison, and (3) optional traceability export. Runs without HTML mocks — pure document-level analysis.
